appraisal_events.evidence: « Le duc et duchesse de Guermantes sont beaucoup plus modernes, beaucoup plus intelligents… leur salon est de trois cents ans en avance sur celui de leur cousin. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The passage reports worldly judgments that favor the duke and duchess as more modern and intelligent than their cousins, which locally elevates the duchess by comparison.

status_effects.explanation: Her local position is heightened by a repeated social verdict that presents her salon as superior and more modern than that of her cousins.
